name: LF Capital Acquisition Corp. II Units
summary: LF Capital Acquisition Corp. II Units each consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. LF Capital Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses and intends to focus its search on companies in the financial services industry. It is based in New York, NY.
